summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stock Management and Discount Codes features. Backend: 26/26 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly. Fixed critical bug in remove-discount endpoint (route ordering issue).

fixed.issue: Route was being caught by /api/cart/{product_id} parameterized route, causing discount removal to fail silently
fixed.fix: Moved remove-discount route definition BEFORE the parameterized {product_id} route in server.py

fixed.issue: Cart API response structure changed from array to {items: [], discount: null} but context wasn't updated
fixed.fix: Updated fetchCart to extract items and discount from response.data, added applyDiscount and removeDiscount functions

passed_tests: Backend: Products have stock, low_stock_threshold, track_stock fields
Backend: Stock validation prevents adding out-of-stock products to cart
Backend: Stock validation prevents adding more than available quantity
Backend: Cart items include stock availability info
Backend: Producer can update stock for their products
Backend: Admin can update stock for any product
Backend: Admin can list all discount codes
Backend: Admin can create new discount codes
Backend: Admin can update discount codes
Backend: Admin can toggle discount code status
Backend: Admin can delete discount codes
Backend: Duplicate discount code creation fails
Backend: Customer cannot access admin discount codes endpoint
Backend: Customer can apply percentage discount (SAVE10)
Backend: Customer can apply fixed discount (FLAT5)
Backend: Customer can apply free shipping discount (FREESHIP)
Backend: Invalid discount code returns error
Backend: Cart shows applied discount
Backend: Customer can remove applied discount
Backend: Discount application requires authentication
Frontend: Products page shows 'Out of Stock' overlay on out-of-stock products
Frontend: Products page shows 'Only X left' badge for low stock products
Frontend: Product detail page shows 'Out of Stock' badge and disabled add-to-cart
Frontend: Cart page shows discount code input and Apply button
Frontend: Cart page shows applied discount with code, percentage, and savings
Frontend: Cart page shows updated total after discount
Frontend: Admin Discount Codes page lists all codes with CRUD actions
Frontend: Admin can create new discount codes via form
Frontend: Producer Products page shows Stock column with clickable badges
Frontend: Producer can see Out of Stock and low stock indicators
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering in FastAPI: Specific routes like /cart/remove-discount must be defined BEFORE parameterized routes like /cart/{product_id} to avoid route conflicts
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/context/CartContext.js - Updated to handle new cart API response structure with items and discount
/app/backend/tests/test_stock_discount_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for stock and discount features
seed_data_creation: Used existing discount codes: SAVE10 (10% off), FLAT5 ($5 off), FREESHIP (free shipping with $30 min). Products with stock: prod_a761669eb3ed (stock=0), prod_8eb6256e409d (stock=3, low stock)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock Management and Discount Codes features fully implemented and tested. Key files: server.py (backend endpoints), CartContext.js (frontend cart state), CartPage.js (discount UI), ProductCard.js (stock badges), AdminDiscountCodes.js (admin CRUD), ProducerProducts.js (stock management). Route ordering fix applied - remove-discount must come before {product_id} route.

stock_management.details: Products have stock fields, validation prevents out-of-stock purchases, UI shows stock status badges

discount_codes_crud.details: Admin can create/read/update/delete discount codes via /admin/discount-codes page

discount_application.details: Customers can apply/remove discount codes in cart, codes validate correctly (min amount, usage limits, dates)

stock_decrement_on_checkout.details: Stock is atomically decremented when payment is confirmed in checkout_status endpoint
